name: PdeAcctgRptSubmtCntrFLoad

postCopyScript.value: UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.StgA_TMP_PdeAcctgRptSubmtCntrFLoad SET NET_INGR_CST_AMT = NET_INGR_CST_AMT/100, NET_DISPNS_FEE_AMT = NET_DISPNS_FEE_AMT/100, NET_SLS_TAX_AMT = NET_SLS_TAX_AMT/100, NET_GROS_DRUG_CST_BFR_AMT = NET_GROS_DRUG_CST_BFR_AMT/100, NET_GROS_DRUG_CST_AFTR_AMT = NET_GROS_DRUG_CST_AFTR_AMT/100, NET_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT = NET_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT/100, NET_PATN_PAY_AMT = NET_PATN_PAY_AMT/100, NET_OTHR_TRUE_OOP_AMT = NET_OTHR_TRUE_OOP_AMT/100, NET_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT = NET_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT/100, NET_TRUE_OOP_AMT = NET_TRUE_OOP_AMT/100, NET_PATN_LIAB_REDC_AMT = NET_PATN_LIAB_REDC_AMT/100, NET_COV_PLN_PD_AMT = NET_COV_PLN_PD_AMT/100, NET_NCOV_PLN_PD_AMT = NET_NCOV_PLN_PD_AMT/100, TOT_DUE_AMT = TOT_DUE_AMT/100, NET_EST_PT_OF_SALE_RBT_AMT = NET_EST_PT_OF_SALE_RBT_AMT/100, NET_VCCN_ADM_FEE_AMT = NET_VCCN_ADM_FEE_AMT/100, NET_RPTD_GAP_DSCNT_AMT = NET_RPTD_GAP_DSCNT_AMT/100;

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT PDE_ACCTG_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_SK, FILE_ID, SUBMT_CNTR_SEQ_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SUBMT_CMS_CNTR_ID, AS_OF_YR, AS_OF_MO, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PDE_ACCTG_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_F AS T USING cte AS S ON T.PDE_ACCTG_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_SK = S.PDE_ACCTG_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.FILE_ID
